content.text:
I can see you're asking about the current temperature in Burbank, IL. However, I don't have access to real-time weather data or the ability to fetch current temperatures from external sources.

The text you've provided appears to be JavaScript code related to New Relic's browser agent - a tool for monitoring web applications. This is completely unrelated to weather information.

To get the current temperature in Burbank, IL, I'd recommend:
1. Checking a weather website like Weather.com or AccuWeather
2. Using a weather app on your phone
3. Searching "Burbank IL weather" in your web browser

Is there something else I can help you with regarding this JavaScript code or any other topic?
